zh.lifeSummary: 當William Reygate於1305年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯頓時，他的父親Robert De Reygate25歲，母親Elizabeth15歲。他於1332年與Theophania Funtaynes在英國越可爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年在英國越可爾黑波恩享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Reygate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Reygate was born in 1305, in Steeton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert De Reygate, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 15. He married Theophania Funtaynes in 1332, in Steeton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1367, in Sherburn, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62.

Il a épousé Theophania Funtaynes en 1332, à Steeton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1367, à Sherburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.Stiveton, Sherburn, West Riding Yorkshir: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셔번 인 엘멧
ko.lifeSummary: William Reygate(이)가 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스티턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Reygate(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1332년 영국 요르크실르 스티턴에서 Theophania Funtaynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 영국 요르크실르 셔번에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Reygate родился в 1305 г. в местности ститон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert De Reygate было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Theophania Funtaynes в 1332 г. в местности ститон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1367 г. в местности ширбурн, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
